heading: Step 3: Create the Error Handler Function
body:
Create the Function to handle errors for a failed AWS
EventBridge Trigger via a `POST` request to the
[Create a new
Function](atlas/app-services/admin/api/v3) endpoint.

```bash
curl -X POST \
   https://services.cloud.mongodb.com/api/admin/v3.0/groups/{groupId}/apps/{appId}/functions \
   -H 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
   -d '{
         "name": "string",
         "private": true,
         "source": "string",
         "run_as_system": true
      }'
```
